app.name: Lyd
app.storage.memory: Heads up: this browser can't keep things after you close the tab (no OPFS). Your stuff lives only for this session.
home.record.title: Listen to a song
home.record.subtitle: record or import — see its chords
home.tuner.title: Tune up
home.tuner.subtitle: guitar, bass, or any old sound
home.metronome.title: Keep time
home.metronome.subtitle: steady, swung, or delightfully odd
home.doodler.title: Hum a melody
home.doodler.subtitle: watch it turn into notes
home.library.title: Your shelf
home.library.subtitle: recordings, doodles, and scribbles
record.title: Listen to a song
record.micDenied: I need the microphone to listen. You can also import a file instead.
record.tooShort: That was a bit too short to make sense of — try a few seconds more.
record.error: Hmm, I couldn't read that one. Try a wav, mp3, or m4a file.
tuner.title: Tune up
tuner.micDenied: The tuner needs the microphone to hear you.
metronome.title: Keep time
doodler.title: Hum a melody
doodler.hint: hum, whistle, or la-la-la — I'll write it down
doodler.empty: I didn't catch a melody there — try humming a little louder and steadier.
doodler.snapHint: tidy it up? (your call — the loose version is just as real)
doodler.micDenied: I need the microphone to hear your melody.
library.title: Your shelf
library.empty.recordings: No recordings yet — go listen to a song!
library.empty.doodles: No doodles yet — go hum something!
library.empty.journal: Nothing here yet. After you play, jot a line about how it felt.
library.deleteConfirm: Really delete this? It can't be undone.
